shortcuts.action: Sets focus in the global search
Go back in history to the previous item
Go forward in history. Used after going back in history
Switches to the personal insights tab
Expand and collapse the navigation menu
Search within a space. The space should be open
Opens the send direct message panel
Opens all spaces and direct message list
Go to drafts message list. Opens drafts list
Add people to the open space
Invokes the attach file command in the current conversation
Navigate up in the space list
Navigate down in the space list
Collapses all the sections in the space list
Expands all the sections in the space list
Show whiteboards for the current space
Edits the last sent message in space
Increases the font size of the messages in space or sharing content
Decreases the font size of the messages in space or sharing content
Inserts the personal meeting room link in the message input area
Calls the selected searched person(People only)
Copies the current space details to clipboard
Focuses on the main conversation window
Focuses the text input box in the messaging area
Answer an incoming call with a message
Toggle mute audio on a call
Start or stop video on a call
Show or hide the video view while sharing
Shares a file or a video
Clears all annotations on the whiteboard
Open or close the Chat pane
Don't read out in meeting chat notifications
Show or hide participants without video
Show or hide participant name in videos
Start an audio call from search
Start a video call from search
Focus on the closed captions menu
Send a thumbs up reaction in the meeting
Send a clapping hands reaction in the meeting
Send a haha reaction in the meeting
Send a celebrate reaction in the meeting
Send a love reaction in the meeting
Bold on/off for the selected text
Italics on/off for the selected text
Underline on/off for the selected text
Pastes and matches the style of the copied text (windows pastes as snippet pasteSpecial)
